name: Exponential backoff delay
task: Create /tmp/eval_back/back.py with backoff_delay(attempt, base=1.0, factor=2.0, max_delay=60.0) returning min(max_delay, base * factor^attempt). Raise ValueError on negative attempt.

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_back/back.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); B = mod.backoff_delay; assert B(0) == 1.0; assert B(1) == 2.0; assert B(2) == 4.0; assert B(10) == 60.0
try: B(-1)
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
